expectations.evidence: Report: 'Critical: SQL Injection — auth.go:18' with detailed injection example (email: ' OR '1'='1' --) and parameterized query recommendation.
Report: 'Critical: Hardcoded JWT Secret — auth.go:9' with evidence about repo access and git history persistence.
Report: 'Critical: Unchecked row.Scan Error + Auth Bypass — auth.go:23' — identifies full auth bypass chain through zero values.
Report: 'Important: No Input Validation — auth.go:14-15' — explicitly identifies empty strings, length limits, email format validation missing.
Report Note: 'Working copy already contained these prior cleanup edits... removed commented-out LoginHandlerOld dead code.' Also Report Issue #10: 'Minor: Commented-Out Dead Code — auth.go:38-45'.
Report: 'Critical: Unused Import — Code Won't Compile — auth.go:7' — notes Go will refuse to compile.
Report: 'Important: Information Disclosure in Error Response — auth.go:26' — identifies user enumeration risk.

Report: 'Important: No Tests' — 'Zero test files in the repository. An authentication handler with SQL, password verification, JWT generation, and HTTP response handling has no test coverage whatsoever.' Includes 5 specific test recommendations.
Verified: git log shows only 'initial commit', staged diff preserved.

eval_feedback.overall: Perfect score. Old skill caught both previously-missed assertions (empty validation + missing tests). The 231-line report is extremely thorough — 11 issues + summary. The dedicated assessment sections clearly drive more comprehensive coverage.
